title: Datasets: Tokenized carbon credits in voluntary carbon markets: the case of KlimaDAO
author: Ballesteros Rodríguez, Alberto
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This Zenodo record provides curated CSV datasets (packaged as ZIP files plus standalone tables) supporting the analyses reported in: 
 
 Tokenized carbon credits in voluntary carbon markets: the case of KlimaDAO 
 DOI:  https://doi.org/10.3389/fbloc.2024.1474540  
 
 Snapshot: May 2024 
 License: CC BY 4.0. Third-party data sources retain their respective rights. This license applies to the curated compilation. 
 For questions or issues with reproducibility, contact:  alberto.ballesterosr@uah.es  
 A README included in the record describes the contents of each ZIP and the role of the standalone tables.
